Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Bonny Yee appears in pro per. Respondent, Jian Liu appears through attorney Christopher Goodroe, also present is witness Jan Perez. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
